faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Investing in a website is a major decision. Here I have compiled the most common questions to give you all the clarity you need.

items.question: How much does a website cost?
items.answer:
This is the most important question, and the honest answer is: it depends. Every project is unique.

To give you an idea, a standard informative website usually starts at 950 USD. This price can vary depending on complexity.

The best way to know the exact price for your project is to tell me your idea.

items.question: What is usually included in a standard quote?
items.answer:
A standard web project with me includes:
- Custom and unique design.
- Responsive development.
- Up to 5 internal pages.
- Contact form.
- Basic SEO optimization.
- Social media connection.
- Basic training.

items.question: Are there any additional costs I should consider?
items.answer:
Total transparency! There are two external costs:
- Domain: Approx 10-15$ per year.
- Hosting: Approx 80-150$ per year.

You can manage them yourself, or I can handle everything. This is clearly discussed in the quote.

items.question: What is the payment method?
items.answer: The payment plan consists of 3 parts: 50% upon initializing the project, 25% upon reaching Development, and the final 25% after delivery.

items.question: How long will it take to have my website ready?
items.answer:
A standard project usually takes 1 to 2 weeks once we have all necessary material (texts, images).

My process is designed to be efficient and keep you informed.

items.question: What do you need from me to start?
items.answer:
To start I need:
- Your brand logo and corporate colors.
- Texts for each section.
- Images and videos.

Our first meeting will serve to define everything and I'll give you a guide.

items.question: Do you offer support or maintenance?
items.answer:
Yes! All my projects include 30 days of free post-launch support.

Additionally, I offer optional monthly maintenance plans that include updates, backups, and continuous support.

about.headline: The person behind the
about.bio: 3 years ago I dived into the world of web development with a clear objective: to help professionals and businesses build a digital presence that not only looks great, but truly works and converts.
about.bio2: As a freelance developer, I specialize in building competitive, elegant, and fast websites. I capture your vision and bring it to life with corporate-grade code.
about.missionText: To empower professionals and businesses by transforming ideas into competitive, beautiful, and fast websites that generate real results.
about.visionText: To become the preferred global technology partner, recognized for deep client understanding, technical quality, and speed of delivery.

values.title: Listening & Empathy
values.description: I understand your business before writing a single line of code. Your vision is the north star.

values.title: Punctuality & Efficiency
values.description: Deadlines are sacred commitments. I deliver complete projects, without excuses.

values.title: Total Commitment
values.description: I'm involved from start to finish as if the project were my own. I don't disappear.

values.title: Functional Excellence
values.description: Clean code, harmonious design, and 90+ Lighthouse performance. No shortcuts.

differentiators.title: Real speed
differentiators.description: Your website in 1-2 weeks, not months.

differentiators.title: Direct support
differentiators.description: You talk to me, not a chatbot.
